infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow managemycounter App to access your location to verify checkout details and locate nearby network-enabled devices.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow managemycounter App to access the camera to photograph documents, purchase receipts, and scan product barcode tags.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Allow managemycounter App to access Bluetooth to discover and print billing receipts on thermal tickets printers.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: Allow managemycounter App to access Bluetooth to connect to billing printers.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow managemycounter App to access your location to verify checkout details.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow managemycounter App to access the camera to scan product barcodes.
